title: Adaptive Brightness Updated
description: a simple fabric mod that changes your brightness according to the light level. now in newer versions!
body:
this mod dynamically changes the brightness level of minecraft based on the light level of the block you're standing on. for configuration editing, you'll need [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).

this mod is currently only available for fabric, I won't personally make a forge port. If anyone wants one, they're free to port it themselves.

requires [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config).
